turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Hi, this is a bit urgent, I ran out of my medication this morning and I'm not sure what to do.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Okay, thanks for letting me know. I really need to see if there's any way to get a refill or something same-day. Is that possible?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Um, I’m not sure who I’m speaking with, but I really need help with my medication refill. Can you assist me with that?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: I can help with your medication refill, please provide your date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure, it's June 15, 1976. Can we get this sorted out today? I really need it.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Which medication do you need refilled today?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: It's for my blood pressure medication, Lisinopril. I’m really hoping to get it today since I’m completely out.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: How many days of lisinopril do you have left? If you are already out, just let me know.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: I'm completely out, I took my last dose this morning. Is there any way I can get a refill today?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: I have that you are out of within a pearl. What is the best phone number for a call back about your refill.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Oh, I think there might be a mix-up. I meant to say I’m out of Lisinopril, not anything else. My best number for a call back is 555-123-4567. Can we get this sorted out today?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: 4964 593 is that correct?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Um, no, that’s not my number. It’s 555-123-4567. Can you check if there's a way to get my Lisinopril refilled today?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: What is the best phone number for staff to call you back about your refill?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: It’s 555-123-4567. I really need to get this refill today, though. Is there any way to make that happen?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Got it. Is there anything else you'd like the staff to know about your refill request, for example, any symptoms or urgency?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Yeah, I'm out of my blood pressure medication, so it’s kind of urgent. I’d really appreciate it if they could help me get it sorted out today. Thank you!

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: 1 moment, while I process your refill request.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure, thank you for your help! I really appreciate it.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Could you please provide the name of the pharmacy you want to use for your medication? If you know, the address City or any details like cross streets or nearby stores? That would help too if you have their phone or fax number, please share that as well.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Of course! I use the Rite Aid on Main Street, the address is 123 Main St, Springfield. Their phone number is 555-987-6543. I hope that helps!

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Great. Please tell me the name of the pharmacy at any details. You know, about its location such as the street City or anything nearby that helps identify it.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: It’s Rite Aid, located at 123 Main St, Springfield. That's right near the corner of Main and Elm, if that helps. Is everything set for my refill now?
